# Cacto - Instagram DM Automation for Solo Creators

Cacto is a lightweight, flat-rate Instagram comment and DM automation platform (Cacto V1) built specifically for solo creators, coaches, and digital product sellers. It helps you bypass link-in-bio friction by delivering resources, digital products, and direct Stripe checkout buttons straight to your followers' inboxes when they trigger pre-defined comment keywords on your Reels, posts, or stories. This markdown index summarizes Cacto V1 DM automation capabilities, comment keyword triggers, 25 free growth tools, and 17 masterclass blogs.

## Core Value Propositions

- **Cacto V1 DM Automation**: Deliver lead magnets and instant Stripe payment links directly into DMs within 3 seconds of a user comment.
- **Comment Keyword Triggers**: Instant response triggering based on customizable keyword matches in post comments and story mentions.
- **Creator-First Architecture**: Zero subscriber-tier penalties or contact limits. Enjoy unlimited interactions on a simple, streamlined platform.
- **100% Meta Graph API Compliant**: Operates strictly within official Meta Graph API developer protocols, eliminating password exposure and browser-emulation bans.
- **Algorithmic Engagement Boost**: Rotates public comment replies to double post comment density and maximize organic Reel distribution.
- **Single-Intent Conversion Architecture**: Mobile-first DM buttons designed for instant click-throughs and frictionless one-tap purchases.
- **Complete Growth Suite**: Includes 24 interactive free growth tools and 17 masterclass AEO/SEO guides.

## Core Site Pages

- Homepage: https://cacto.cc/
- Onboarding & Login: https://cacto.cc/login
- About & Mission: https://cacto.cc/about
- Interactive Tools Suite (25 Tools): https://cacto.cc/tools
- Creator Blog & Growth Guides (17 Blogs): https://cacto.cc/blog
